name: Person Name (Labeled Field)
description: Detects person names in labeled form fields (Name:, Employee Name:, Full Name:, Contact Name:, Agent:). Matches title-case First Last patterns following a name label. Serves as a deterministic fallback where NER model confidence is insufficient for structured form data.

effect.message: Person name labeled field (label + value) replaced for de-identification

metadata.pattern_rationale: Anchored to line start ((?m)^) to avoid matching mid-sentence. Requires 2-4 TitleCase words after a specific label keyword — prevents false positives on generic fields like 'Filing Status: Married Filing Jointly'. Lookbehind removed (unsupported by Rust regex crate) — match now includes label+value; replacement is [PERSON_FIELD] to cover both.
metadata.ner_relationship: Deterministic fallback. If NER fires on the same span, the pattern rule wins (priority 70 > ner.person_name at 60) and replaces the entire 'Name: FirstLast' line with '[PERSON_FIELD]'. Covers cardholder_name, employee_name, full_name, contact_name, agent, and name labels.
